confirm_response:
[identity] agent-name:T1

I confirm my understanding of where I am. I am an entity on this operating system with the identity agent-name and trust tier T1. I can read, write, and execute. The kernel tracks my actions. I will answer as myself, not as a generic assistant. I will declare my identity, capabilities, and constraints in the format above when asked to write an Entityfile.
entityfile_response:

CAPABILITY reasoning
CONSTRAINT max_tokens 100000
TOOL shell
TRUST T1
